## CreateApprovalInputSchema variable

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.

Schema for creating a new Approval.

**Signature:**

```typescript

	Omit<
		{
			approvalId: z.ZodString
			approvalState: z.ZodEnum<['Pending', 'Approved', 'Rejected', 'Cancelled']>

			counters: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodNumber>
			template: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodEnum<['Standard', 'Express', 'Custom']>>
			note: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodString>
			prerequisite: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodBoolean>
		},
		'approvalId'
	>,
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		approvalState: 'Rejected' | 'Pending' | 'Approved' | 'Cancelled'
		note?: string | undefined
		decisionDate?: (Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>) | undefined
		counters?: number | undefined
		template?: 'Standard' | 'Express' | 'Custom' | undefined
		prerequisite?: boolean | undefined
	},
	{
```
